SOURCE: 92069209.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (92069209.pdf)
SUMMARY: Performance-driven and accomplished Director of Information Technology with over 14 years of experience in managing and providing leadership in a diverse technological environment. Strong leader with proven success in improving efficiencies, reducing costs, and implementing standards and procedures that improve business processes and functionality.
SKILLS: budget, client-server, customer satisfaction, DEC, direction, GIS, Government, Help Desk support, IBM, IBM Mainframe, information technology, local area network, leadership, managing, Microsoft Exchange, modems, networking, organizational, PC's, project management, routers, SAN, servers, strategic, upgrading, VAX, VoIP, VSE

SOURCE: 92069209.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 05/2000 to 01/2014
DESCRIPTION: Provided leadership in directing, planning, managing, and implementing the information technology needs of the City of Greensboro. Partnered with NCDOT and GDOT to implement a City-wide fiber optic network infrastructure. Implemented on-line payments for parking tickets and utility bills.

SOURCE: 92069209.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 07/1998 to 05/2000
DESCRIPTION: Managed the Desktop Services Division and facilitated the installation of 900+ workstations ahead of schedule. Implemented a $2.8 million internal service charge back structure for Help Desk support.

SOURCE: 92069209.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 06/1989 to 07/1998
DESCRIPTION: Installed and configured communication equipment. Managed the setup of communication circuits for campus computer labs.

SOURCE: 92069209.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 09/1986 to 06/1989
DESCRIPTION: Repaired and installed PC's, servers, modems, and other communication equipment. Developed the wiring infrastructure for student registration.
